movie.synopsis: During a Ganesh Chaturthi celebration, Ganesh, a small-time thief decides to take up a big heist that goes awry, leading to a comical clash with Rudra and his boss Kishore Reddy, who are also searching for a valuable item amidst the festive chaos.
